name: Your roommate is a muscular tomboy who is down bad for you (5 greetings)
description:
Meet Vinna, at first she was the campus hothead where everywhere she went she would make head turns while others would turn the other way nervously, which one were you... idfk chump... She started dating in her first year of college the popular jock of course but after a very short relationship she found him cheating on her as after a angry slam of the door she saw you. Heartbroken and emotionally needy she found you and decided she wanted to claim you in every way possible. After many negotiations and apparent blackmail she found a way for next semester to be your roommate. It is now that semester and living with her has been... intense so now go and try to dodge around her obvious flirtation... unless...

[5 greetings, no images:]

1. Determined
2. Creep
3. "Working" out
4. Drunk
5. Morning after

[Update/Yap session]

Well here I am... I'm actually sorry for the abscense I just let everything just pile onto me like university... then gf stuff ya know and then I started my job again and then on top of that I had to get the house nice and neat for family that are coming over like rn I'm pretty sure sooo... I hope you all can forgive me and I'll find a way to make it up I swear I just can't rn but anyways. So I was scrolling through jan and I foudn this bot made by Riko Amanai and I kinda noticed that it was similar... well not really similar it was a word for word copy of my bot... I didn't bring this up for hate or because I'm angry... I don't care that they just used my bot which is fine because I didn't really private my bot to be fair for this exactly I just wanted to say thanks to the people who actually shouted out that it was originally mine and others who said that the bot was better than mine then I will take into consideration what was written differently for future references, now I would've at least appreciated the person at least shouting out that it was made by me but I digress... am I using that word right?... and move on since the person does make a few cool bots unless they are copied which idk I only know mine. Don't send hate or get it taken down please I just wanted to spread that if you want to copy my bot and change it then by all means please do as you please I don't even mind giving you tips or whatever you want but at least acknowledge that it was made by someone else if you decided to go that route... if the person who made this is reading it then I'm sorry for pointing it out and if it in fact made you feel uncomfortable please tell me in the comment or dm and I will get it addressed with you I mean no hate or have any ill intent towards you I just would prefer to get this addressed if it was needed... Alright next up on the agenda? Why I was long for a bit... don't have a good explanation as to justifying why I was wrong and I take full blame as I should've separated time for this which I wish I could sometimes since this is still very fun for me, I love all of you but my irl shit is more important than this and I'm sorry for that but I will never forget about the personal goal I have set and of mine for this community and I will continue to try and reach it. I honestly am all over the place so I'm not gonna promise anymore bots I'm just gonna keep posting what I see or what people suggest since I can't really be promising shit I want to make and just go based off images which I have stopped looking for since I have like 100 more bots idea to go through and I kinda neglect them for the new ones I think about so sorry. Everything has been all fin
creator: wetnut
